Date: Tue, 27 Jun 2006 11:26:44 -0400
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: vacation

Hi Darren,
I have an eye doctor appointment this Thursday, so I
will need to leave at
1:30. I will not be back on Thursday as they will
dilate my eyes 3
different times, so it will take several hours until
they are back to normal.
Also, I would like to take Thursday, July 13th
through Tuesday July 18th
off as vacation. I have a short trip to Minnesota
planned.
Hopefully, none of these days will create any
problem for anyone?
Thanks.
Peg

Date: Wed, 19 Apr 2006 12:43:34 -0400
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: vacation

Darren,
My daughter is having a baby - due May 4th or so. I
would like to take a
week's vacation when she has the baby. I may not
know until the day
before, when exactly I will be taking off. I'm
assuming it will be the
week of May 8th, but just don't know for sure.
Please check with Jeffrey to make sure this is not a
problem. She lives
close to me, so I will be around if I need to come
in for anything.
Thanks.
Peg
